Name: Application E-commerce Laravel
Text Area 1: Stack Technique: Laravel 12 + Filament 4 + Stripe + TailwindCSS + Alpine.js

Name: Frontend (Blade + Tailwind + Alpine.js)
Text Area 1:
Layouts: app / boutique / guest
Views: home / products / cart / checkout / auth / profile
Components Blade: 17 composants (navigation / card-product / header...)
Assets: TailwindCSS 3.x + Alpine.js 3.x (compilés via Vite 7)

Name: Filament Panels
Text Area 1:
Admin Panel (/admin) - Couleur: Amber
  Resources: CategoryResource / ProductResource / OrderResource
  Pages: Dashboard + CRUD pages

Customer Panel (/customer) - Couleur: Green
  Espace Client (auto-discover)

Name: Routing Layer
Text Area 1:
web.php: Routes publiques + authentifiées
auth.php: Authentification (Breeze)
Filament: Auto-routing admin + customer panels

Name: Controllers (HTTP)
Text Area 1:
HomeController - Page d'accueil
ProductController - Catalogue + Détail + Catégorie
CartController - Panier CRUD (auth)
CheckoutController - Processus commande + Stripe (auth)
ProfileController - Gestion profil (auth)
Auth/ - 9 controllers Breeze (register/login/password/email)

Name: Business Logic (Enums + Model Methods)
Text Area 1:
Enums:
  UserRole: admin / customer
  OrderStatus: pending → confirmed → processing → shipped → delivered | cancelled
  PaymentStatus: unpaid / paid / refunded / partially_refunded / failed

Cart: Calcul automatique (subtotal / tax 8.5% / shipping / total)
Order: Workflow statut (confirm / markAsProcessing / ship / deliver / cancel)

Name: Models (Eloquent ORM)
Text Area 1:
User - Cart - CartItem - Product - Category - Order - OrderItem
Relations: HasOne / HasMany / BelongsTo
Scopes: active / featured / inCategory / sortByPrice / pending
Accessors: formatted_price / effective_price / image_url / in_stock

Name: Database (SQL)
Text Area 1:
11 Migrations | 7 Factories | 1 Seeder
Tables: users / categories / products / carts / cart_items / orders / order_items / cache / jobs

Name: External Services
Text Area 1:
Stripe API - Paiement en ligne (stripe-php ^19.1)
File Storage - Images produits/catégories (local/S3)
